untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle requires precise multi-bar pattern geometry (cup bottom within 6% range, symmetrical rims A and B, handle rise confirmation) that cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicators. The pattern needs: (1) identification of two equal-height rim points across multiple bars, (2) validation that bottom variation stays within 6%, (3) confirmation of handle bounce after cup descent. These structural requirements exceed point-in-time indicator capabilities and would need pattern recognition or lookback logic unavailable in standard indicator set.
